items.title: Charlotte Hornets salary cap situation after trading LaMelo Ball and Josh Green for Naz Reid and picks.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Charlotte Hornets salary cap situation after trading LaMelo Ball and Josh Green for Naz Reid and picks.

$75 million in room below the luxury tax line.

Enough room to re-sign Coby White, use the entirety of their $40.8 million trade exception, and $15 million mid-level.

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves project to be $4.7M over the luxury tax after adding LaMelo Ball and Josh Green.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Minnesota Timberwolves project to be $4.7M over the luxury tax after adding LaMelo Ball and Josh Green.

Minnesota will be $3.3M under the first apron and $16.3M under the second apron, where they will be hard-capped due to aggregating together Julius Randle & Naz Reid as outgoing salary.

1/2

items.title: Hornets reportedly trading LaMelo Ball, Josh Green to Timberwolves for Naz Reid, draft picks
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Hornets reportedly trading LaMelo Ball, Josh Green to Timberwolves for Naz Reid, draft picks Yahoo Sports

items.title: LaMelo Ball and Josh Green are going to the Wolves for Naz Reid, a 2033 unprotected 1st round pick, swaps in 2028, 2029, and 2030, and 3 second round picks, a league source confirmed. Shams was first on it. A huge swing for both teams.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: LaMelo Ball and Josh Green are going to the Wolves for Naz Reid, a 2033 unprotected 1st round pick, swaps in 2028, 2029, and 2030, and 3 second round picks, a league source confirmed. Shams was first on it. A huge swing for both teams.

items.title: [Charania] BREAKING: The Charlotte Hornets are trading star guard LaMelo Ball and Josh Green to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Naz Reid, a 2033 unprotected first-round pick, three first-round pick swaps (2028, 2029, 2030) and three second-round picks (2029, 2032, 2033), sources tell ESPN.

items.title: [Scotto] One framework loosely kicked around included Charlotte’s Miles Bridges, Josh Green, and a potential first-round draft pick going to Sacramento in exchange for Sabonis.
